code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import AsyncStorage from'@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';import{authAPI,productAPI}from'../api/productAPI';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=createContext(undefined);export const AuthProvider=({children})=>{const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[isLoading,setIsLoading]=useState(true);const[userStats,setUserStats]=useState({productos:0,ventas:0,compras:0});useEffect(()=>{loadUser();},[]);useEffect(()=>{if(user){updateUserStats();}},[user]);const
